description: The component that drives the Asset Optimization Wizard.

fields.Root: The slot specified in the generated UI for the wizard. If this is null, the wizard will use the Root slot.
fields.IgnoreNonpersistentUsers: Ignore the contents of the slots of users in the session or not.
fields._maxResolution: The max resolution field that's part of the generated UI.
fields._message: The message for the current progress and statuses of this wizard's work.
